overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked dystopian urban area at night. The character approaches and walks under a massive spinning Ferris wheel illuminated with bright pink neon lights, passing through a makeshift encampment with tents and temporary shelters.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban street with burning wreckage ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street toward the burning vehicle wreckage and Ferris wheel

notable_agents.action: character with black umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk
destroyed vehicle with orange flames and smoke rising
tall illuminated advertisement screen on a pole
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban street at night, with the camera following a character past construction barriers. A burning vehicle wreckage glows orange in the distance, and a massive pink neon Ferris wheel becomes visible ahead. The wet asphalt reflects the streetlights and neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: area under the massive neon Ferris wheel

events.description: entering the Ferris wheel area from the open street
camera tilts upward to look at the spinning Ferris wheel structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the Ferris wheel and looking up at the massive spinning neon structure

entered.detail: massive spinning wheel structure with bright pink neon lights
metal framework and support beams of the Ferris wheel
wrecked vehicle on the side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters the area beneath the massive Ferris wheel, transitioning from the open street to a semi-covered space. The camera tilts up to reveal the intricate metal framework and spinning pink neon lights of the wheel overhead. The ground changes from asphalt to concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift encampment walkway under the Ferris wheel

events.description: moving from under the Ferris wheel to the tent-lined pathway

agents.ego_description: walking along the path lined with tents and temporary shelters

entered.detail: makeshift camping tents and temporary shelters lining the path
piles of garbage bags and discarded items
red and white striped barriers along the right side

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow pathway beneath the Ferris wheel, the scene is flanked by makeshift tents and shelters on the left and concrete barriers on the right. The pink neon lights cast a vibrant glow on the wet concrete and trash piles scattered along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: encampment gathering area with fire barrel

events.description: approaching a group of people gathered around a burning barrel
passing close by the group, temporarily blocking view of the Ferris wheel

agents.ego_description: walking past a group of people sitting around a fire barrel

notable_agents.action: group of three people sitting around a burning barrel
woman standing near the group wearing red pants

entered.detail: metal barrel with burning fire providing warmth and light
worn couch and chairs arranged around the fire
blue and black garbage bags piled near the seating area

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a small gathering area where a group of people sit around a burning barrel. The fire provides warm orange light that mixes with the pink neon glow from the Ferris wheel. The camera passes close by the group, showing detailed interactions and temporary furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: continuing encampment walkway with graffiti barriers

events.description: passing the fire group and continuing down the path

agents.ego_description: continuing down the path past the encampment area

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the camera on the path

entered.detail: concrete barrier with white painted text reading NO REGRETS
illuminated store sign with COLA visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing past the gathering area, the path features a concrete barrier with 'NO REGRETS' graffiti on the right. The Ferris wheel recedes into the background while a COLA sign becomes visible ahead. The camera passes another pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban street that transitions into a neon-lit makeshift encampment beneath a massive Ferris wheel. It begins by following a character past construction barriers and glowing vehicle wreckage, where the wet asphalt reflects the distant pink neon of the wheel ahead. As the character moves forward, the camera tilts upward to reveal the intricate metal framework and spinning lights overhead while the ground shifts from asphalt to a concrete sidewalk. The scene then narrows into a pathway flanked by makeshift tents and trash piles, eventually opening into a gathering area where the warm orange light of a burning barrel mixes with the vibrant pink glow. Finally, the camera passes a concrete barrier marked with graffiti and a passing pedestrian as the Ferris wheel recedes into the background and a COLA sign emerges in the distance.
